notes:
## 2.7.0

## What's new

- **Steady Home** — swipe between pages, create app folders, dock + rearrange, and home widgets (to-dos / intention).
- **Recents** — Android Recents from the ⋮ menu and lock/rest screen; Samsung gesture Recents no longer gets bounced.
- **Lock screen Back** — Back returns to Steady Home; Recents button opens overview.
- **WhatsApp Status / Channels** — stronger leave-Updates path (tap Chats, Back, re-check) so Status doesn’t stick.
- **Hide Steady notifications** — quieter enforcement / filter status when the parent toggle is on.
- **Rename phone** — website GitHub sync retries on 409 SHA conflicts.
- **Website** — removed “both on one phone / weaker” marketing; parent remote is the dashboard. Signed-in dashboard polish.

_Hard-refresh the dashboard after deploy. Install on kid phones for Home + WhatsApp + Recents fixes._
